title: [install]
text: [install] The [install] section of the initialization file contains information about the current installation. Description When Uniface is installed, information about the installation is recorded in the [install] section. (On Microsoft Windows platforms, this information is also stored in the Registry. ) After installation, you can modify some of these settings, such as Project and Browser , which are developer preferences. Other settings should not be modified. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
